key_items: Kevin Warsh confirmed to Federal Reserve Board with pro-crypto stance, clearing path to chairmanship
CLARITY Act final 309-page draft released with strong regulatory framework positioning Bitcoin as regulated digital capital
Bitcoin Bull-Bear Cycle Indicator turns green for first time since March 2023; no major distribution signs despite 37% rally since April
reasoning: The convergence of pro-crypto Federal Reserve leadership, comprehensive regulatory clarity legislation advancing through Senate markup, and on-chain indicators flashing green creates a strongly bullish macro environment for Bitcoin over the next 1-7 days. Major institutional infrastructure developments (JPMorgan tokenized funds, DTCC/Chainlink integration, Square's 1M merchants) and positive technical structure with contained volatility support sustained upward momentum.
risks: Geopolitical escalation around the Strait of Hormuz creating broad macro economic uncertainty could trigger risk-off sentiment that overwhelms crypto-specific bullish catalysts; additionally, large miner capitulation (MARA's $1.5B BTC sale) signals potential supply pressure if other institutional holders follow the pivot toward AI infrastructure.
